Standard Installation charges (INR 1499 + GST as applicable) to be paid directly to brand technician at doorstep to avail installation. Installation will be provided by the Brand within 48 to 72 hours of delivery.

Standard installation service includes unboxing and installing the AC, connecting Outdoor unit and Indoor Unit with the standard wire/ pipe length provided with the product to the available power source, sealing the hole from the outside, conducting gas check, checking cooling performance and product demonstration. Please provide a ladder to the technician.

Any additional out of scope accessories and services, if required are chargeable as per the Brand's rate card and shall be paid directly to the technician. Such as Electrical cabling, drain piping, Outdoor stand for AC units, dismantling of existing AC units, Nitrogen testing to reuse old installed piping, etc. Applicable GST would be charged where applicable. Kindly check with the technician to confirm additional work or services required before installation commencement.
Extra copper pipe beyond 3m (already included in the box) will be chargeable at INR 850/- per meter.
Our service expert will capture the device photos before and after the service, as required to capture proof of service completion.
Brand contact details: Customer Helpline: +91 829-123-8800, Email: support@cruiseac.com

For units installed by entities outside of Brand's service network, warranty repairs for defects attributed to installation may be charged by the Brand’s service partner. Please reach out to Brand to know more about the nearest authorized service partner and warranty eligibility.

Split AC with inverter compressor: Variable tonnage technology for faster cooling that adjusts power depending on cooling requirement. With VarioQool Convertible 4-in-1, you get flexibility to increase or decrease cooling capacity as per requirements.
Capacity (1 Ton): Suitable for small sized rooms (up to 110 sq.ft.) ; Cooling Capacity: 3440W ; Ambient Temperature: 48 ℃ with 2-Way Auto Air Swing

Energy Rating : 3 Stars - Best in class efficiency | Annual Energy Consumption: 604.99 Units per year | ISEER Value: 4.41 (Please Refer Energy Label). The star rating is as per New BEE guidelines valid until Dec 2027
Manufacturer Warranty: 1 Year Comprehensive Warranty on the Product, 1 Year on PCB, 10 Years on Compressor (T&C)
Condenser Coil: Copper Coil (Better cooling and requires low maintenance) with Rust-O-Shield Blue technology: Prevents from rust & corrosion; Increases durability for un-interrupted cooling.
Key Features: Stabilizer free operation within 145-285 voltage range; Convertible 4-in-1 cooling modes; Noise Level: IDU - 36 (db) & ODU – 58 (db)

Special Features: 7-in-1 with PM 2.5 Air Filters, 100% Hi Grooved Copper Condenser, Rust-O-shield Paint Protection, 4 Fan Speed Modes, Smart Diagnosis System, Magic LED Display, Wireless LED Remote, Auto Blow & Clean, 2 way Auto Airflow
Refrigerant Ggas: R32 Environmental friendly gas with no ozone depletion potential
Item Dimensions & Weight: Indoor Unit (WxDxH) - 80x23x29.5 cms, Outdoor Unit (WxDxH) - 78x24.1x55.7 cms; Net Weights: IDU 9.3 kg, ODU 23 kg

Included in the box: 1 Indoor Unit, 1 Outdoor Unit, 1 Remote, 1 Inter connecting cable 11.48 feet, 1 Inter connecting pipe 9.84 feet, 2 Batteries ; Note: Brand Warranty can be availed using amazon invoice | User manual can be accessed from brand website

Somesh Sharma
5 out of 5 stars
Good AC with a good price point and efficient cooling even at 26 degrees.
Reviewed in India on 3 June 2026
Size: 1.0T 3 Star ’26 (New Star Rating)
Verified Purchase

Okay, okay, here is the review. Received it a few days ago, the installation person called the next day and was very good in nature and helpful overall. Used a vacuum to properly install the air conditioner, and the air conditioner was installed. Now using the product for a week. I have a 110 sq. ft. room on the top floor, and it gets heated like an oven. This air conditioner I turn on at evening after office hours when my room is still hot. I set it to 26 degrees and the fan to high. It cools my room in merely 15 minutes. At night, even in 26 degrees, I feel very cool and comfortable. I was very skeptical of the brand, but Cruise AC has proved to be a good investment, and I hope I can recommend it further for the coming years. I will use it for a month and buy another 2 units because of the price and efficiency. The unit works silently and has a bright display with good features. The OD unit looks durable, and the remote has various features that sometimes don't even come in 1.5-ton A/Cs.

I bought the Daikin MTKL50XV16 AC from Amazon and had it installed on 19 April 2026 by their authorized partner Ms Enterprises, Bangalore. What followed has been one of the worst purchase experiences I’ve had.

First, the installation charges were shockingly high, around ₹11,468 plus an additional ₹1,000 for drilling. It honestly felt like I was being taken advantage ofand ripped off.

Second, the installation quality itself was poor. The technicians did not seem careful or professional and the work did not inspire any confidence.

Now the main issue—the AC does not cool properly from day one. Even when set to 20°C, the room temperature doesn’t go below 28°C. That defeats the entire purpose of buying an AC, especially from a brand like Daikin which is supposed to be reliable. Also the ac noise levels are high, the quality is gone down to drain.

Customer support has made things worse. Calls get redirected to WhatsApp with no real resolution. There is no proper follow-up, no accountability, and no urgency.

At this point, I regret buying this product. Between poor performance, inflated installation costs, and weak after-sales support, this has been a very disappointing experience.

I would strongly advise potential buyers to think twice before purchasing this model—or at the very least, be extremely cautious about installation and service.

I am still waiting for a proper resolution from Daikin. If the company is serious about its reputation, they should step in and fix this immediately.

Terrible mistake buying the Daikin 1.5 Ton 3 Star AC.

Let me tell you my experience so you do not make the same mistake.

1) Installation scam. They quote you tremendously high - they said its a lot of work and materials are costly. Fair enough I'll Pay. But they do not have proper tools to do the job. No core drilling tool. Literally used a hammer drill to make a hole in my wall. No Copper pipe bending tool all done by hand very unprofessional. The stand they get is super cheap probably 500 But charged me 1200. Did not use cement to fill up the hold was escaping by stuffing the hole with foam from the box, when asked about it, he said - Do you have it? THIS WAS THE LEAST OF THE PROBLEMS.

2) Installation done - Turned on AC. After the compressor kicks in - Literally felt like a Helicopter was on my roof. Video attached for reference.

3) Called customer care - they sent over the same guy. Tightened the bolts attaching the outdoor unit to the stand and said problem solved.

4) Guess what, same issue. As soon as the compressor kicks in, Unit attempts to take off. I called the customer care and asked to send over another professional. The guy dismantles the Outdoor unit and says there is a fault in the compressor. They agreed for a compressor swap on a 2 day old unit. No replacement offered. I naturally declined as i do not want to mess with a new unit.

5) Called Amazon - they agreed for a refund. Return was scheduled. I got everything dismantled and packed it in a box. After a few days of the pickup - the app said the PACKAGE MAY BE LOST IN TRANSIT. No refund issued till now. I called the customer care (AMAZON) very helpful assured me about the refund but said to wait for 13 days as the seller has to review the package and then issue the refund.

6) After 3 weeks finally received the refund but lost about 4k for installation etc. Plus there is a hole in my wall this whole while.

Daikin this is not acceptable. I usually do not waste my time in posting reviews but this time they deserved my time and attention for a scathing review.

1 out of 5 stars
Dishonest Service & Poor Performance - Do Not Buy!
Reviewed in India on 15 May 2026
Size: New Star Rated +Wifi (6 IN 1 Convertible)
Verified Purchase

I am writing this as a genuine warning to other buyers. This has been a terrible experience from start to finish.

The Installation Trap:

Before purchasing, the product page stated "Free Installation." I even went a step further and called customer care to confirm this before the technicians arrived, and they assured me it was free. However, as soon as the installation was finished, the stance changed completely. I was told it was a paid service. I was charged ₹1,800 for the labor and a total of ₹3,000 including other equipment charges. This is blatant misinformation.

The Product Performance:

Even if the installation had been free, the AC itself is not worth it. The cooling functions are not good and it has failed to meet basic expectations. The performance is weak and does not justify the price of the unit, let alone the extra ₹3,000 I had to pay.

Final Verdict:

The company is misleading customers regarding service costs and delivering a subpar product. Save yourself the headache and the extra money—look for a different brand.

Think
1 out of 5 stars
Need to improve in air blasting process.
Reviewed in India on 19 April 2026
Verified Purchase

Here’s the updated version including your room size:

⸻

The cooling performance is not meeting expectations. My room size is 10×12 sq. ft., which should be easily handled by the AC. I also have a Panasonic AC in another room, and my brother uses a Daikin AC, so I have a direct comparison.

In this unit, the air seems to be blowing from above the fins, directing it toward the ceiling rather than into the room. Because of this, the airflow is not effective and the cooling feels weaker than expected.

In contrast, both Panasonic and Daikin ACs direct airflow from below the fins, pushing the air downward and allowing it to circulate properly across the room. This results in faster and more efficient cooling.

Overall, despite the small room size, the airflow design in this AC is not effective and needs improvement to match the performance of these brands.

Definitely go for it!
Reviewed in India on 9 April 2026
Size: 1.5 T 3 Star-Dust Buster
Verified Purchase

The product is totally worth the money. Got the latest manufactured product with no damage. Cooling starts within 5 mins and is very good; the AC is also silent. The installation was done on the same day & technician did a great job. So if there's any issue with the installation for anyone, it doesn't reflect on the product's quality; it means the service guy isn't experienced in that area.

It's the most feature-loaded AC with the highest cooling capacity compared to other brands & with new star ratings, it is one of the best energy-efficient ACs too.

A 4-way air swing & a longer IDU would have been great because it'd have increased the airflow, but for small/medium rooms, it won't matter much. For larger rooms (150sqft+), it'll just take a few extra minutes to cool

The app experience is also good, with better UI and more features. Although the sleep profile feature they talk about is average because you can’t set multiple switch on/off timer (just 1) and this timer is not a part of sleep profile. It’s accessibility could have been better and it could have more things user can control like setting the exact time (rather than giving one hour span) you want the AC to turn on/off throughout the night (refer screenshot)

For the promotional 6 yrs warranty, I paid 588/- extra on the Panasonic website to claim it.

Recently Purchased 1.5ton 3 star AC on April 30 2026. Here are my observations

Pros:

• Fast and powerful cooling

• Low noise operation

• Good energy efficiency and power saving

• MirAI app support is very useful

• AC can be controlled from mobile remotely

• Electricity consumption tracking feature is very helpful

• Smart connectivity works smoothly using Wi-fi.

• Compact and premium indoor unit design

• Panasonic extended warranty offer is a big plus. 6yrs on PCB and 10yrs on Compressor!

Cons:

• Remote control size is too small

• Indoor unit supports only 2-way airflow, 4-way airflow would have improved cooling distribution

• Extra installation materials are very expensive

• Copper pipe/wire extension charges per meter are high.

• Additional electrical setup costs increase quickly beyond standard installation

Installation Experience:

• Installation quality was good overall

• Technicians completed the work properly

• Standard installation is fine

• Customers should ask for clear pricing before extra work starts

• Additional copper piping, wiring, drain pipe extension, stand, and 16A plug setup can significantly increase final cost

Final Verdict: Very good AC with excellent cooling, smart app features, and useful electricity monitoring. Apart from high extra installation costs and small remote size, overall experience has been very good.

Definitely worth considering. ⭐⭐⭐⭐✨

2. Extremely Poor Cooling

Even after the struggle of getting it installed, the performance is a huge letdown. It is marketed as a 1.5 Ton unit, but it doesn't feel like it at all. Even after running it all night, the room temperature doesn't even drop to 24°C. It just keeps running constantly without actually cooling the space.

3. Don't Trust the Hype

My advice: Do not buy this based on YouTube influencer reviews. It’s clear they are paid to promote it. This has been a total waste of money and a massive frustration.

Save your hard-earned money and look for a more reliable brand.

Hitachi Split AC with Inverter Compressor delivers faster cooling and lower energy consumption. The variable-speed compressor intelligently adjusts its power based on the heat load, ensuring consistent and uninterrupted cooling. Powered by EEV Precision Cool Technology, it accurately monitors cooling requirements and regulates refrigerant flow for superior performance and enhanced efficiency
Capacity : 1.5 Ton AC suitable for medium sized rooms up to 150 sq. ft., delivering efficient cooling even at 54°C. Features 4‑Way Swing and 550 CFM IDU airflow for powerful, uniform cooling
Energy Rating: 3 Star Energy efficiency | Annual Energy Consumption : 864.39 | ISEER Value: 4.30
Manufacturer Warranty: 1 year Comprehensive and 5 years on Compressor Warranty to be claimed with Amazon Invoice. User Manual available at Brand Website.

Condenser Coil: Built with 100% copper tubes for faster cooling, low maintenance, and long‑lasting durability. Features Nano Tech Ultra coating on the IDU, which protects against rust and corrosion for enhanced reliability.

Key Features: Operates at low noise level of 34 dBA for quiet comfort. Xpandable Plus Technology for flexible cooling performance. The 4‑Way Swing ensures uniform air distribution across the room. Features Ice Clean (Frost Wash Technology) for odour‑free, hygienic air, and Silent Air with Wave Blade Design for smooth and noise‑reduced airflow.

Special Features : Built‑in Wi‑Fi technology for smart control, 3 in 1 Smart View Display , Long Air throw upto 24m , advanced Octa Sensor Technology for intelligent cooling, and a Filter Clean Indicator for easy maintenance. Comes with an Anti‑Bacterial Mesh Filter to ensure cleaner air. Delivers reliable cooling even at temperatures up to 54°C.
Refrigerant Gas: R32 - Environmental Friendly - No Ozone Depletion Potential
Item Dimensions & Weight: IDU – 95cm x 29.4cm x 23cm (w x h x d), Outdoor : 75 cm X 55 cm X 29 cm (w x h x d), IDU: 10Kg, ODU: 24 Kg
Included In The Box: 1 Indoor Unit, 1 Outdoor Unit, Inter Connecting Copper Pipe of 3m length, 1 Remote

Split AC with Inverter Compressor: Enjoy powerful cooling even at 60°C with a variable speed compressor that adapts to heat load. 8-in-1 Convertible Modes (up to 115%* capacity) deliver customized cooling and energy savings, while Wi-Fi enabled smart control lets you stay cool, comfortable, and connected—anytime, from anywhere.
Capacity: 1.5 Ton: Suitable For Medium Sized Rooms (Up To 150 Sq.Ft); Air Flow: 618 CFM, Cooling Capacity: 4700 W & Flawless Cooling Even At 55°C Surrounding Temprature

5 Star Energy Rating; Certified for High Energy Efficiency, with an Energy Consumption of 644.41 units per year and a high ISEER value of 5.65, Low Electricity Consumption without compromising on powerful cooling performance

Comprehensive Warranty Coverage: Enjoy worry-free ownership with a 1-year comprehensive warranty on the product, 10 years on Compressor and 5 years on PCB, ensuring unmatched durability and performance.

100% copper grooved tubes, condenser coil with Dual Gold Fin & NanoTek Coating ensures faster cooling, superior durability, and protection against rust, corrosion, and leakage for long-lasting performance.

Wi-Fi Smart Control with Geo Sensing: Control your AC anytime, anywhere via your smartphone. Geo sensing detects your location (within ~5 km) and pre-cools the room before you arrive, while Sleep Profile let you customize temperature settings through the night for personalized comfort and better energy savings.

Fast Cooling with Flexi Control & Self Clean: Enjoy powerful cooling even at 55°C with a heavy-duty compressor. Hybrid Mode delivers 30% faster cooling, while 8-in-1 Flexi Mode lets you adjust capacity for optimal comfort and energy savings. 4-step self-clean technology prevents dust, mold, and bacteria buildup, while powerful air throw cools rooms quickly and evenly.
Refrigerant Gas: Eco-friendly R32 gas with zero ozone depletion potential and 68% lower GWP compared to R410A

Long-Lasting Durability with 100% Copper & Ocean Black Protection: Engineered for longevity, the 100% Copper tubes are reinforced with a specialized Ocean Black coating. This anti-corrosive shield prevents rust and damage from salt, smoke, and pollutants, ensuring consistent, uninterrupted cooling for years

Key Features: Smart Inverter Compressor; AI Convertible 6-in-1; 2 Way Air Swing; VIRAAT Mode; HD Filter with Anti-Virus Protection; ADC Sensor; Cools at 55⁰ C; Stabilizer free operation within 120V-290V voltage range, Temperature Display type – Magic Display (LED) for temperature and timer modes, Noise Level: IDU - 26 (db) & ODU – 55 (db); Moisture removal

Refrigerant gas: R32 - Environment-Friendly - Zero Ozone Depletion (ODP) & Lower Global Warming Potential (GWP)

Highly Disappointed – Poor Cooling, Not Worth Buying
Reviewed in India on 24 March 2026
Style Name: 1.5 Ton 3 star | 2026
Verified Purchase

Extremely poor performance from LG AC (Model: AS-Q18JNXE-2026). I am using this 1.5-ton AC in a small 100 sq.ft room, which should cool very quickly, but the performance is completely disappointing.

Even when set to 22°C, the room still feels like 30°C — there is almost no effective cooling. For such a small room, this AC should chill within minutes, but it struggles badly.

To get even slightly comfortable at night, the AC needs to be turned on hours in advance, which is unacceptable. Power consumption is high, but the cooling output is very poor.

This is not expected from a brand like LG. Either the product quality is very low or there is a serious design issue. Completely a waste of money.

I strongly do NOT recommend this model to anyone. Please look for better alternatives.

Hitachi Split AC with Inverter Compressor delivers faster cooling and lower energy consumption. The variable-speed compressor intelligently adjusts its power based on the heat load, ensuring consistent and uninterrupted cooling. Powered by EEV Precision Cool Technology, it accurately monitors cooling requirements and regulates refrigerant flow for superior performance and enhanced efficiency
Capacity : 1 Ton AC suitable for small sized rooms ( up to 110 sq.ft), delivering efficient cooling even at 54°C. Features 4‑Way Swing and 410 CFM IDU airflow for powerful, uniform cooling
Energy Rating: 3 Star Energy Efficiency | Annual Energy Consumption : 632.61 units | ISEER Value: 4.30

Manufacturer Warranty: 1‑year standard warranty, 10 years on the compressor, and 5 years on the controller. Brand warranty can be availed using the Amazon invoice. (Upgrade for a paid 5‑year comprehensive warranty, offering added benefits and extended protection at ₹299+GST *T&C apply)

Condenser Coil: Built with 100% copper tubes for faster cooling, low maintenance, and long‑lasting durability. Features Nano Tech Ultra coating on the IDU, which protects against rust and corrosion for enhanced reliability.

Key Features: Operates at low noise level of 32 dBA for quiet comfort. Xpandable Plus Technology for flexible cooling performance. The 4‑Way Swing ensures uniform air distribution across the room. Features Ice Clean (Frost Wash Technology) for odour‑free, hygienic air, and Silent Air with Wave Blade Design for smooth and noise‑reduced airflow.

Special Features : Long Air throw upto 24m , advanced Octa Sensor Technology for intelligent cooling, and a Filter Clean Indicator for easy maintenance. Comes with an Anti‑Bacterial Mesh Filter to ensure cleaner air. Delivers reliable cooling even at temperatures up to 54°C.
Refrigerant Gas: R32 - Environmental Friendly - No Ozone Depletion Potential
Item Dimensions & Weight: IDU – 78cm x 28cm x 22cm (w x h x d), Outdoor : 75 cm X 55 cm X 29 cm (w x h x d), IDU: 8.5 Kg, ODU: 23 Kg
Included In The Box: 1 Indoor Unit, 1 Outdoor Unit, Inter Connecting Copper Pipe of 3m length, 1 Remote

I purchased this Hitachi 1 Ton 3-Star AC on April 18, 2026, and it has been nothing short of a nightmare since.

The Installation Saga:

It took 3 days just to get the unit installed. Once the technicians finally finished, the AC didn't even last one single day. It stopped working almost immediately.

Non-Existent Service Support:

I have been calling the service center repeatedly since April 28, 2026. For over a week, technicians kept canceling my service tickets without ever visiting my home or even calling.

Finally, after a lot of complaints, a technician showed up on May 7, 2026. He claimed there was an issue with the PCB but stated a "senior technician" would need to re-verify it. Since that visit, the request was—once again—canceled without any follow-up or visit. Mr. Ravi Kumar is the senior technician who is assigned and has been repeatedly cancelling the request without visit.

The Endless "48-Hour" Loop:

The customer care team is completely clueless. Every time I call, it’s like a repeat telecast: they have no idea what is happening and simply tell me to "please wait for 48 hours." Those 48 hours never end. On asking the customer care team to share the number of the technician or the service center, they only say we do not have any contact numbers and can’t help you. Exact words used “You don’t have any option now other than waiting, okay”

Verdict:

• Pathetic Product: Failed on day one.

• Pathetic Service Center: No coordination or accountability.

• Pathetic Technicians: Constant cancellations and zero resolution.

I am deeply repenting this purchase. Save your money, your time, and your sanity—stay away from Hitachi.

Split AC with inverter compressor: Variable speed compressor which adjusts cooling capacity depending on heat load. The convertible feature with 8 different cooling modes adjusts cooling performances ranging from 40%* to HC* to match different needs basis room size or occupancy, enhancing energy efficiency and providing personalized comfort with minimal effort.
Capacity (1.5 Ton): Suitable for medium sized rooms (120-170 sq ft); Airflow of 703 CFM; Cooling Capacity of 5100 W & Ambient operating Temperature: upto 55 degree Celsius with 4 way Swing.
Energy Rating: 5 Star. Annual Energy Consumption: 681.01 kWh. ISEER Value: 5.80
Manufacturer Warranty: 10 years on Compressor and 5 years on PCB. Brand Warranty can be availed using amazon invoice.

Copper Condenser Coil: Better cooling and requires low maintenance. Healthy Cooling: Equipped with PM0.1 Filter to provide clean air. Longer Heat Exchanger Life: Special ShieldBlu+ protection coating to prevent leakages.
Key Features- Stabilizer free operation with 100-290 V operating voltage range; Hidden Temperature Display; Noise Level: IDU - 34 (db) & ODU: 54 (db).

Special Feature: Premium Wi-Fi Inverter Smart Split AC, India's 1st Matter enabled RAC powered by MirAie. Dust Buster technology Auto cleans ODU coils after every 8 hours of running to provide steady cooling, better efficiency & longer life. 100% Copper Tubing helps in faster heat exchange. AI mode helps to maintain comfort conditioning & saves energy. With an ambient operating temperature of up to 55 deg.C and higher airflow, faster cooling is ensured even in extreme heat condition.
Refrigerant Gas: R32 – Environment Friendly - "Zero" Ozone Depletion Potential (ODP)
Item Dimensions & Weight: IDU - 104.0 cm x 24.9 cm x 29.6 cm (L x B x H), ODU: 78.0 cm x 28.8 cm x 54.2 cm (L x B x H), IDU: 12.0 Kg, ODU: 26.0 Kg

Santosh Kulkarni
5 out of 5 stars
Excellent Product and Smooth Installation Experience
Reviewed in India on 10 May 2026
Size: 1.5 Ton 5 Star_Dust Removal
Verified Purchase

I purchased this Panasonic AC from Dawntech Electronics on 8th May, it was delivered on 9th May, and installed on 10th May.

Before ordering and after ordering, I was quite anxious after reading several reviews about missing copper pipes, connecting cables, and defective units. Fortunately, my package included everything required for installation, and the unit was in perfect condition.

The installation experience was smooth overall. The technician contacted me within two hours of delivery. When I asked whether he would perform vacuuming during installation, he initially said it was not necessary and he doesnt have the machine at that moment, However, I informed him that vacuuming is a mandatory step even if it meant postponing the installation to the next day. After that, he agreed, returned the next day with a vacuum pump, and completed the installation professionally.

Installation charges were 1652 (1200 installation + 200 outdoor unit installation + 18% gst) , as I have bought things on my own instead of buying from the guy. Also I am from Hyderabad, if that helps.

As for the AC itself, it is an excellent product. It cools the room very quickly, operates quietly, and performs exactly as expected. The build quality and overall performance are impressive.

Ishtiyaq Husain
1 out of 5 stars
Just don’t buy it. You cannot trust it.
Reviewed in India on 11 March 2026
Size: 1.5 Ton 5 Star_Dust Removal
Verified Purchase

This is my experience with Panasonic 1.5 Ton 5 Star AC 2026 model in Mumbai.

Lest talk about the build quality, build quality is ok, indoor unit is big compare to other brands. Remote feels very cheap but it has led light. External unit looks and feels solid.

I bought it on 7th March from Amazon.

It was delivered today morning, 9th March.

I booked the installation for the next day. But I got a call from the installation technician. He asked if he could come today for installation.

I said ok.

The technician came around 2 PM and started the installation.

After installation was finished, he started the AC.

But it was not cooling.

He checked everything and then told me the unit is defective.

He said I need to contact Amazon.

I contacted Amazon support.

They said the same product is not available in their warehouse.

So the only option is return and refund.

I asked about the installation charges.

The technician said normally I don’t have to pay until installation is completed.

But in case of return, I have to pay the installation charges.

Amazon support told me they will reimburse the installation amount after the pickup is completed. But I have to share original bill from the installation technician.

I was not the only one.

The installation technician told me that today morning he installed another unit of the same AC and that one was also defective.

There was no gas in that unit.

I have attached the screenshot for entites exposed to home assistant via matter.

I would definitely not recommend this ac to anyone.

You may hear from people that it is an excellent AC and top quality.

That is true when the AC works.

But the problem is reliability.

When it works, it works very well.

But many times users get frustrated because of quality issues and poor service.

Update:

I have shared the original bill from service provider and now amazon denied the payment by saying you have no written proof. I told them I have call recording but amazon denied it

I recently got my Panasonic AC installed and I’m extremely happy with the overall experience. The installation process was smooth, quick, and handled with great professionalism.

The service engineer was very friendly, polite, and patient. He explained everything clearly, including how to use and maintain the AC properly. The installation was done perfectly with neat finishing and proper setup.

Coming to performance, the cooling is very good and effective. The noise level is quite low and not disturbing at all. There are no leakage issues, which is a big plus.

The WiFi connectivity and smart features work well, and the app control is convenient. However, there is a slight latency sometimes while giving commands, but it’s manageable.

Overall, a great product with excellent installation service. Very satisfied with Panasonic—highly recommended!

1 out of 5 stars
Pathetic installation and service
Reviewed in India on 26 May 2024
Set name: 183V Vectra CAW
Verified Purchase

I bought this AC with a belief that it is a TATA brand and expected a great product. Within 1 week of installation, the AC wasn’t working well and started to give out hissing sound when it was turned on. On surfing the internet, I was shocked to see the issue was due to refrigerant leak. Shocked to see such a health hazard to which me and family including my 3 year old kid was exposed to. All I can relate to is a faulty installation at first place.

Then the usual process started. Submitted a complaint and got a response that it will be rectified in 24-72hrs. Even after 72hrs, there is no response. Once again, I contacted the customer care and they provided me with the manager of authorized service center for Voltas. He never picks the calls nor he was able to send me the technician to look into my AC.

And at last he said he will send a technician first thing in the morning and I began to wait. No one turned up. As I was traveling the next day, I was literally pleading and begging to have a technician. But it fell on deaf ears only. I had to cancel my travel, only to wait for no response again.

Again it started to same cycle of calling the manager of the service center who said he will send the technician first thing in the Sunday morning. Had to wait the whole day to see no one bothered to service my AC. Such a pathetic customer service and I don’t understand why a brand like Voltas have given authorizations to do service to some third rated guys as Urban company guys are way better than these.

When am posting this, it has been around 6 days since my initial complaint and even escalating to Voltas customer care, they don’t seem to bother. I never expected this kind of attitude from a reputed brand like TATA Group.

Gaurav
1 out of 5 stars
Do not recommend - stay far away. Spend a little extra and stick with Koreans or Japanese
Reviewed in India on 18 April 2026
Set name: 183V Vectra CAW
Verified Purchase

Worst product ever. 1. This is not a 1.5 ton ac. Its rated capacity is 4800 Watts or 1.36 ton ac.

2. There is no information about this product on Voltas product website to understand how to use the operations correctly

3. The AC severly shortcylces in a large room, not sure why - it reads the temperature wrong, maybe its low quality temperature sensor in the system

Now coming to the quality part:

1. Of the two units I purchased 1 developed a hissing and swooshing noise within 1 month.

2. The engineer who visited from their service center for the complaint, refused to try re-installing (given that was the best course of action) citing another engineer had installed it first, not clear why would that be the case

3. The initial technician (Named Parvez in MG road Gurgaon - very helpful) who had installed the AC, promptly came the next day to reinstall the AC and did so however the sound got worse

4. On further inspection he mentioned that the IDU is likely faulty as the noise is coming from the IDU

5. The next day I must have called these guys over 15 times just to get an acknowledgement of a visit and then finally a technician was assigned, to my horror the same person who refused to re-install the AC, only to learn that he would come again and try to reinstall the AC yet again!

There need to be better SOPs. I wonder how this company has survived so long. I am sorry to say will probably never buy their ACs again. Just a bad experience altogether. Incrementally even the government here should be held responsible that they are unable to keep a check on what kind of products are being sold in the market. It is just a bad overall experience.

Do not recommend - not just because of the quality of the product but also its after sales service and lack of basic SOPs on when to engage senior technicians/engineers. At the same time I would recommend Amazon to not list such products on their website.

I am very happy with this Samsung Split AC. The cooling is powerful and fast, and the WindFree feature makes the room comfortable without direct cold air hitting you. It runs quietly, which is great for night use, and the white design looks clean and premium.

The WiFi and smart features are very convenient. I can control the AC from my phone, and the voice control option is a nice bonus. The Digital Inverter technology also helps with efficient performance, and the copper condenser gives confidence about durability.

Overall, this is a great AC for anyone looking for strong cooling, modern smart features, and comfortable airflow. Definitely worth buying.

Full Capacity 2 Ton Inverter Split AC : Variable speed compressor provides optimal cooling depending on heat load, ranging from as low as 25% to as high as 110% of capacity, providing powerful cooling combined with higher energy efficiency for more savings.
Cooling Capacity - 7040W: Suitable for 250 to 300 sq.ft room size; 15 metre long reach airflow; Cools even at 55°C; 4 Way Swing
BEE Star Rating: 4 Star. Annual Energy Consumption: 1090.01 kWh. ISEER Value: 5.00; High Part Load (50%) Efficiency 5.77

Warranty: 1 Year Comprehensive Warranty on the Product; 10 Year Warranty on Inverter Compressor; 5 Year Warranty on Inverter Outdoor PCB. Brand Warranty can be claimed with Dawntech Electronics Private Limited Seller Invoice.

100% Copper Evaporator & Condenser Coil: Better cooling and requires low maintenance. Anti-Corrosion Treatment on Heat Exchanger: Epoxy Resin Coating on Evaporator and Blue Fin Coating on Condenser enhance durability and long life with trouble free performance.
Key Features: Wide Operating Voltage Range 155V ~ 280V ; Energy Saving with Human Sensor ; Noise Level Quiet: IDU - 31 dB(A);Backlit Remote

Special Features : Conformal Coated PCB for Long Life, Over 80% Cooling at 49°C; Self Diagnosis, High Voltage Protection 700V (50ms), Optional Wireless LAN accessory available at extra cost for App & Voice Control (Google Home, Amazon Alexa)
Refrigerant Gas: R32 - Environment-Friendly - Zero ODP (Ozone Depletion Potential)
Item Dimensions in mm (H*W*D) : Indoor Unit - 280x980x240 ; Outdoor Unit - 716x820x315, Item Net Weight: Indoor Unit - 12.5kg, Outdoor Unit - 39.0kg
Included In The Box: 1 Indoor Unit, 1 Wireless Remote Controller, 1 Operating Manual, 1 Outdoor Unit, 3 Metre Copper Pipe, Installation Kit. Note : User Manual can be accessed from Brand Website.

General is the Premium Tier of AC's
Reviewed in India on 5 May 2026
Verified Purchase

Took 2 ton unit and it has 7040 watts of cooling. It cools 330 sqft hall like a breeze. These unit are made in India variants and outdoor has at least 2 layer condenser. Indoor has really good air throw and thus it become little loud at max speed.

Installation process is one of the best I have seen in Bangalore. I have LG and Daikin AC's but General AC technician was the most knowledgeable and professional. They did proper vacuum for more than 20 minutes and did leak checks and wrapped the pipes in proper manner. The Installation was done within the same day of delivery of the ac.

Overall liked the whole package of customer service and product.

The 4‑Way Swing ensures uniform air distribution across the room. Features Ice Clean (Frost Wash Technology) for odour‑free clean air, and Silent Air with Wave Blade Design for smooth and noise‑reduced airflow.

abhay
5 out of 5 stars
I think for 34 k it's pretty good 😊
Reviewed in India on 16 May 2026
Size: New star rated
Verified Purchase

Cooling is excellent and air throw is very strong. Outdoor unit makes slight noise but overall both indoor and outdoor units are quite silent during normal operation.

A few important things buyers should know before purchase:

- Outdoor stand is not compulsory if you can safely install the outdoor unit on a terrace/floor area.

- Company claims around 10 ft pipe length, but usable length feels closer to 7–8 ft.

- Outdoor stand is not included. Local stand costs around ₹400–500, company stand around ₹1000.

- Extra copper pipe from company costs around ₹400 per foot.

- Installation took around 2–3 hours.

Very important:

Please ask the technicians for proper vacuum pumping during installation. Many installers skip this unless specifically asked.

Also:

- Install a stabilizer. This is an inverter AC with PCB electronics and voltage fluctuations can damage it.

- Buy the additional 5-year comprehensive warranty (around ₹353 in my case). Worth it for long-term peace of mind.

- Indoor wire is not included, so use a good-quality thick wire.

- Use braided drain/gas pipe instead of cheap normal pipe.

Other observations:

- No water leakage, bad smell, or gas leakage issues.

- Copper condenser with double-row condenser setup.

- Cooling performance is excellent.

- Display is slightly dim but works fine.

- No Wi-Fi features.

- Service response and technicians were good in my area, but monitor the installation carefully.

- Drilling charges were not taken, but cleaning after installation was not done.

Overall, feels worth the price. LG and Hitachi both seem like good options.

Great AC and Helpful Hitachi Support – Watch Out for Shady Technicians!

The Hitachi AC itself is absolutely brilliant—it cools the room instantly, runs quietly, and the product is highly recommended. However, be careful during the initial setup. The first installation technician sent to my home tried to scam me by claiming my existing wall stand couldn't be used and demanded an absurd ₹5,500 for a new one.

​When I refused to pay, this technician actually went ahead and cancelled the installation request raised by Amazon. Instead of giving in, I bypassed them completely and raised a fresh installation request directly with Hitachi.

I ask Hitachi Outdoor unit Stand Cost and it is just 1000 INR, He was trying to sell me stand that costs 5500/- .

The same supervisor was assigned to my ticket, but after hearing what happened, he immediately corrected the situation and sent a completely different installation guy. This new technician was highly professional and easily mounted the AC on my existing old stand with zero issues, saving me ₹5,500. Great product, but stand your ground if a field worker tries to force expensive accessories on you!

The Daikin 1.5 Ton 5 Star Inverter Split AC (MTKM50XV16) stands out as a premium cooling solution for medium-sized rooms, delivering a strong balance of energy efficiency, performance, and long-term reliability. Its 5-star rating and inverter technology help reduce electricity consumption significantly compared to non-inverter models, making it a smart option for users looking to manage power bills without compromising cooling. The AC cools quickly even in high summer temperatures, and Daikin’s reputation for consistent compressor performance adds confidence in durability. The copper condenser improves heat transfer, supports better cooling efficiency, and generally requires lower maintenance over time.

One of its practical advantages is the PM2.5 filter, which helps improve indoor air quality by trapping fine dust particles—useful for urban households or allergy-sensitive users. The unit operates quietly, which makes it suitable for bedrooms and workspaces, and its stabilizer-free operation adds convenience in areas with voltage fluctuations. Build quality is solid, with a clean, minimal white design that blends well into most interiors.

On the downside, initial pricing can feel higher than some competitors, and installation plus accessories may add to the total cost. Smart Wi-Fi features may also be limited depending on the exact variant, which could matter for users seeking app-based controls.

Overall, the Daikin MTKM50XV16 is an excellent choice for buyers prioritizing powerful cooling, energy savings, cleaner air, and dependable brand value. It is especially well-suited for those seeking long-term performance over low upfront cost.

WHY LLOYD PROTECT AMC/EXTENDED WARRANTY? LLOYD AMC/Extended Warranty is a genuine comprehensive plan recommended and backed by Havells India Limited. This is an exclusive plan which brings together a range of benefits that are meant to safeguard your Air Conditioner (AC). Get certified care by LLOYD experts who are trained to service your Air Conditioner, which ensures you get top performance and efficient cooling.
Protect your LLOYD AC from unexpected repairs. Avail Havells Service & only opt for Genuine parts. Count on us to use our state-of-the-art technology to improve your service experience.
WHAT IS COVERED IN THE PLAN? HIGH-QUALITY REPAIRS: i. 2 Preventive Maintenance/cleaning visits in a year ii. Unlimited Breakdown Visit iii. Unlimited Gas Charging when need arises

ELIGIBILITY: The AMC plan can be purchased from Amazon along with the new LLOYD AC only. AMC commences on the expiration of the standard warranty period and shall continue to remain in force for a period as applicable as per plan.

Does not cover: If the Product is serviced, repaired, installed, de-installed, re-installed or otherwise attended to by any person other than the Authorized Service Representative of the Company. If the customer violates AMC terms and conditions, instruction manual guidelines, recommendations of Authorized Service Representative and/or operates the Product otherwise than as per Product specifications.

If the serial number affixed by the Company on the Product or any part thereof is damaged, defaced, obliterated or erased/ tampered with for any reason whatsoever or if the Product is refurbished/modified. If the Product is operated in conditions otherwise than normal conditions (e.g. abnormal Voltage surge, corrosive/alkaline/acidic atmosphere, dust, installation near the open drainage system etc.)

Any harm caused due to accident, negligence, improper maintenance, mishandling, tampering, incurred in transit by the customer or which can be attributed to the fault of the customer. Any harm resulting from any unforeseeable circumstances such as force majeure event etc. Any liability resulting from any unauthorized adaptations, attachments and/or adjustments to the Product or from a third party apparatus or equipment; Damage to the Product or any parts due to transportation/relocation.

Defects occurring due to usage of local or non-recommended spares, consumables. Visits for re-demonstration at Customer’s request or for de-installation and re-installation at a different location. Failure reported in Product due to external factors like electricity, or otherwise. Any harm caused due to any defect in any electrical/civil installation(s), wiring or third-party products.
Loss of refrigerant caused due to any corrosive action on the original refrigerant pipes, fittings and valves etc. Any damage to the Product due to household pets, rodent or any other insect/animals.

Title: Worst AC Ever – Fake Quality Product Sold by Amazon & Lloyd

I purchased a 1 Ton Lloyd AC from Amazon, and this has been one of the worst experiences ever. The AC turned out to be extremely poor in quality and started creating problems within a very short time. Cooling is terrible, the product quality feels very cheap, and it honestly looks like a defective or dummy unit.

I strongly feel that Amazon and Lloyd are working together to sell low-quality and dummy ACs to customers in the name of branded products. This is completely unacceptable and feels like a scam with customers who trust these big companies.

Even after raising complaints, there was no proper support or permanent solution provided. Very disappointing service and pathetic product quality.

I would never recommend anyone to buy a Lloyd AC from Amazon. Please save your money and avoid this product at all costs.

WHY LLOYD PROTECT AMC/EXTENDED WARRANTY? LLOYD AMC/Extended Warranty is a genuine comprehensive plan recommended and backed by Havells India Limited. This is an exclusive plan which brings together a range of benefits that are meant to safeguard your Air Conditioner (AC). Get certified care by LLOYD experts who are trained to service your Air Conditioner, which ensures you get top performance and efficient cooling.
Protect your LLOYD AC from unexpected repairs. Avail Havells Service & only opt for Genuine parts. Count on us to use our state-of-the-art technology to improve your service experience.
WHAT IS COVERED IN THE PLAN? HIGH-QUALITY REPAIRS: i. 2 Preventive Maintenance/cleaning visits in a year ii. Unlimited Breakdown Visit iii. Unlimited Gas Charging when need arises

ELIGIBILITY: The AMC plan can be purchased from Amazon along with the new LLOYD AC only. AMC commences on the expiration of the standard warranty period and shall continue to remain in force for a period as applicable as per plan.

Does not cover: If the Product is serviced, repaired, installed, de-installed, re-installed or otherwise attended to by any person other than the Authorized Service Representative of the Company. If the customer violates AMC terms and conditions, instruction manual guidelines, recommendations of Authorized Service Representative and/or operates the Product otherwise than as per Product specifications.

If the serial number affixed by the Company on the Product or any part thereof is damaged, defaced, obliterated or erased/ tampered with for any reason whatsoever or if the Product is refurbished/modified. If the Product is operated in conditions otherwise than normal conditions (e.g. abnormal Voltage surge, corrosive/alkaline/acidic atmosphere, dust, installation near the open drainage system etc.)

Any harm caused due to accident, negligence, improper maintenance, mishandling, tampering, incurred in transit by the customer or which can be attributed to the fault of the customer. Any harm resulting from any unforeseeable circumstances such as force majeure event etc. Any liability resulting from any unauthorized adaptations, attachments and/or adjustments to the Product or from a third party apparatus or equipment; Damage to the Product or any parts due to transportation/relocation.

5 out of 5 stars
Good Ac with cheap build quality. Pocket friendly 1.5ton 3 star Ac.
Reviewed in India on 22 March 2026
Size: Old Star Rated (6 IN 1 Convertible, Wifi Ready)
Verified Purchase

I recently bought the Lloyd 1.5 Ton 3-Star AC from Amazon for around ₹27,000. The cooling performance is good and all features work properly, so no issues in functionality.

However, the build quality is disappointing. The material feels cheap and doesn’t match the brand’s reputation. Also, I had to pay ₹2,000 for installation, which was supposed to be free.

Overall, it’s a decent option if you’re on a tight budget. But if you can spend ₹5,000 more, it’s better to go for brands like Panasonic, Blue Star, or Daikin for better quality.

syed a.
3 out of 5 stars
3 Stars – Good Cooling, Fast Delivery, Minor Packaging Concern
Reviewed in India on 7 April 2026
Size: Old Star Rated (6 IN 1 Convertible, Wifi Ready)
Verified Purchase

I received the product within 48 hours, and the delivery was really fast and smooth.

When I got the package, the outdoor unit was perfectly packed. However, the indoor unit packaging looked tampered — the sealing tape was partially removed and some of the protective cotton inside seemed cut or disturbed. Because of this, I initially worried that some parts might be missing, so I didn’t open it immediately.

The next day, a technician was assigned very quickly. During installation, we recorded the unboxing for safety. Thankfully, everything was intact — no parts were missing and there was no damage to either the indoor or outdoor unit.

The technician was professional and did the installation properly.

Coming to the product:

The indoor unit’s plastic quality feels a bit light and not very premium compared to some other brands. Also, the size of the indoor unit is slightly smaller than competitors. That said, it does not affect the cooling performance — cooling is good. Just don’t expect a premium finish.

Installation cost details:

Installation + GST: ~₹1400

Outdoor stand fitting: ₹250

Total: ~₹1750

Note: The outdoor stand is not included in the box. Technicians may offer it for around ₹1500, but you can get it on Amazon for around ₹500, so better to plan in advance.

Features:

Remote is easy to use and works well

Comes with 6 modes, including adjustable cooling capacity (0.8 ton to 1.5 ton), which is a useful feature

Overall, it’s a budget-friendly AC with good cooling performance. I’m giving it 3 stars for now — will see how it performs in the long run.

Hi everyone,

This is not a paid review.

This is an honest review from a middle-class guy who bought this AC with his hard-earned money.

I recently purchased a Panasonic Air Conditioner, and honestly, I am very happy with my decision.

For the price I paid, this AC gives excellent value for money.

The cooling performance is really impressive.

Even at 27°C or 28°C, the room feels very comfortable, and the cooling is smooth and consistent.

One feature I really love is the WiFi connectivity.

Using the Mira AI app, I can control the AC from my mobile phone anytime, anywhere sround the world.

This feels very modern and convenient.

The AC also has many smart features like:

- Auto mode

- Energy-saving options

- Silent operation

- Smart temperature control

- Covert this ac into 8 modes of occupancy saves ac from unwanted easte of energy. technologia.

- ODU blue fins are extremely hood.

- Noiseless IDU and ODU.

- Provides the premium feel.

- Remote is not for what we need actually. We actually font need PC keyboard like buttons. If you need more options you can use Panasonic AC app.

- Its really a smart AC.

- Installation And service was good.

Installing person was very good hearted and IQ full employee.

- One issue i face is , Panasonic Locstion office called me and asked to establish Wiring connection in home using my electrician as ac technician did not do this. So without plan of ac Location and installation mount how can We initiate Electical wiring outlet.. somewhat I managed and finally ac in within 48 hour's of delivery

Another important thing is reliability.

Panasonic is a trusted brand, and the build quality feels strong and durable.

As a middle-class person, we always think twice of Thousans times even after a heavy research using excel sheets before spending money.

But in this case, I truly feel that every rupee I spent is worth it.

So if you are planning to buy a new AC,

I can confidently say that Panasonic AC is a very good choice.

This is my genuine experience.

Not a paid review, just an honest opinion from a satisfied customer.

Thank you!

Raj kumar
5 out of 5 stars
Honest Panasonic AC Online Purchase & Installation Experience
Reviewed in India on 7 May 2026
Size: Wide Indoor + Wi-Fi
Verified Purchase

Everything is good with the AC now. At the beginning, I was not able to recognize whether my AC was cooling properly or not because on the installation day it did not cool. But later I realized that I had either used it only on fan mode or had not selected the correct cooling mode by mistake. After checking properly and using the right settings two days later, the AC started cooling my room perfectly.

Its looks and features are really very good.

The only drawback is that the outdoor unit design is the older grey style. I was excited to get the newer outdoor unit design, but after searching online I found that the new design is mainly provided with offline purchases. However, I want to clarify that only the design is different — the internal components and performance are the same for both online and offline purchases.

The AC is working perfectly, but the Panasonic installation engineers are not very experienced and they charge extra amounts for things that are often unnecessary. I would suggest that if you already know your area may require extra copper pipe, electrical wire, or other installation materials, then buy them yourself from the market instead of depending on the installation team. They may provide low-quality wires or copper pipes and still charge premium prices for them.

It is much better to check the proper Panasonic-recommended specifications yourself and compare market prices before installation. If they are not providing genuine branded materials, ask them to reduce the charges or simply purchase the materials yourself before they arrive. Also discuss all these things with them in advance so that you can avoid unnecessary expenses and save a lot of money.

The WiFi feature and mobile app are very useful—you can control the AC remotely, switch it on/off before reaching home, and adjust settings easily. It adds a lot of convenience.

One important point—during installation, proper vacuuming was not done in my case. Even though the AC is working fine now, I would strongly recommend ensuring vacuuming is done correctly during installation for the best performance and long-term efficiency.

Overall satisfied with the purchase and performance.
